romanization.notes: Stub — Sranan Tongo settings have not been fully authored yet. Unlike Sarnami, Sranan Tongo does NOT use macron (ā/ī/ū) or underdot (ṭ/ḍ/ṇ) diacritics; it is written in plain Dutch-derived Latin orthography, so its romanization/diacritic set is expected to stay empty rather than mirror Sarnami's.
